completed_tasks.name: Human UAT test 1: Storage Location CRUD
Human UAT test 2: Stitching App visual parity
Human UAT test 3: Add New dialog fix
Human UAT test 6: Thread picker multi-add

blockers.description: Thread picker (SearchToAdd) opens for a split second then auto-closes when clicking + Add more
Cover image upload can't be tested locally — file storage not configured for dev
blockers.workaround: Skip in UAT, test on deployed preview

decisions.decision: Use InlineNameDialog (matching designer pattern) instead of window.prompt for Add New
decisions.rationale: UX consistency — all inline-add flows should use the same dialog pattern

next_action: /gsd-debug on thread picker auto-close in search-to-add.tsx — investigate click-outside mousedown handler timing
context_notes: Phase 5 human UAT nearly complete. The SearchableSelect Add New bug was a recurring 3-4 attempt fix — root cause was silent empty-name guard in handlers + duplicate + prefix. Fixed with proper InlineNameDialog. Thread picker bug is separate — not caused by our changes, likely pre-existing from 05-08 viewport flip work. Key files: search-to-add.tsx (click-outside useEffect on line 70-78), project-supplies-tab.tsx (onClose inline arrow fn instability). Three hypotheses to investigate: (1) mousedown timing vs component mount, (2) onClose prop reference changing causing effect re-run, (3) flipUp state change re-render interaction.
